subcodes.first_line: O thou lamp enkindled with the fire of God's love! I have perused thy recent letter and perceived thy deep devotion stirring [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها السراج المتوقد بنار محبة الله قد قرئت تحریرک الجدید و اطلعت بحبک الشدید و هاج
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
